design_philosophy: A premium, Instagram-worthy modern dessert cafe aesthetic blending dark luxury with warm, inviting pastel and cream highlights. The design relies on glassmorphism surfaces, elegant typography, high-contrast imagery, and soft glowing ambient lighting to create a 'Starbucks Reserve' level of sophistication.

scale.overline: text-xs md:text-sm tracking-[0.2em] uppercase font-bold text-primary_accent

grid_strategies.gallery: bento grid with varying spans (col-span-2 row-span-2, col-span-1 row-span-1)

surfaces_and_effects.button_primary: bg-[#C7A17A] text-[#0F0C0B] hover:bg-[#B38F66] transition-all duration-300 font-medium
surfaces_and_effects.button_secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#C7A17A] text-[#C7A17A] hover:bg-[#C7A17A]/10 transition-all duration-300

animations.scroll_reveal: framer-motion initial opacity-0 translate-y-8, whileInView opacity-100 translate-y-0
animations.parallax: react-scroll-parallax or framer-motion useScroll for background elements
animations.micro_interactions: scale-105 on image hover, soft glow intensity increase on card hover

components_strategy.header: Sticky glassmorphism nav (z-50) with transparent background at top, blurring on scroll.
components_strategy.hero: Dark bakery interior background with heavy overlay (bg-black/60). Large Playfair Display heading. Floating glassmorphism 4.8 rating badge.
components_strategy.featured_desserts: Cards using glassmorphism, high quality images, elegant typography for names, subtle add to cart/order interaction.
components_strategy.customer_reviews: Horizontal scroll or bento grid of glass cards. Gold star icons.
components_strategy.instagram_gallery: Tight bento grid (gap-2 or gap-4) of square/tall dessert images. Hover reveals Instagram icon and likes overlay.
components_strategy.custom_cakes_booking: Split layout: Image on one side, elegant text and primary CTA on the other. CTA triggers Shadcn Dialog/Modal for Enquiry Form.
components_strategy.enquiry_form: Shadcn Form inside Dialog. Styled inputs with bg-white/5, border-white/10, focus:border-primary_accent.
components_strategy.store_visit: Google Maps embed with grayscale/dark mode CSS filter. Contact details stacked elegantly.
components_strategy.floating_whatsapp: Fixed bottom-right button, glowing green or gold accent, pulsing animation.

hero_background.description: Dark luxury bakery interior with ambient hanging lights

about_image.description: Interior of a bakery with display cases

gallery_cake_setup.description: Table topped with cakes and cupcakes

instructions_to_main_agent: Configure Tailwind CSS to include the custom colors (background_primary, primary_accent, etc.) and fonts (Playfair Display, Outfit).
Use Shadcn Dialog and Form components for the 'Book Your Cake' enquiry form.
Implement a mobile-first sticky navigation bar and a floating WhatsApp button.
Apply smooth scroll reveal animations (fade in, slide up) to sections using framer-motion.
Ensure the map embed matches the dark theme (use CSS filters like invert(90%) hue-rotate(180deg) or a custom map styling).
DO NOT use Inter font. Ensure headings are Playfair Display.
Use the exact image URLs provided in the media section for their respective components.
Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements.
